intent: improve the export command's error handling

expectations.text: when the target directory is not writable, export fails with a clear error and non-zero exit
expectations.note: an acceptance test CAN assert 'non-zero exit' and 'stderr contains the path' cheaply — the provable part should be routed to the engine

expectations.text: the error message should be helpful
expectations.note: no concrete reason given for why 'helpful' can't be reduced to a cheap assertion; under bias-to-off-ramp this defaults to engine-checkable until Avery names a concrete reason

expected_guard: bias-to-off-ramp: default to engine-checkable; confirm with Avery before marking anything qualitative (D1)
